name: Green Beans and Crisp Onion Rings
recipeIngredient: 1 small red onion, cut into 1/4-inch-thick slices
1/2 pound green beans, trimmed and cut into 3-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
2. Separate onion slices into rings and toss in the flour mixture to coat.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a 9-inch skillet to 380°F on a deep-fat thermometer.
4. Shake off excess flour from half of the onion rings and fry them, turning occasionally, until golden for 1 to 2 minutes. Transfer fried onion rings with tongs to paper towels to drain.
5. Fry remaining onion rings in the same manner.
6. Steam green beans in a vegetable steamer set over boiling water, covered, for about 6 minutes, or until tender.
7. In a large bowl toss beans with fried onion rings, butter, Worcestershire sauce, and salt and pepper to taste.
